name: Homepage FAQ accordion expands and collapses an answer
description: Verifies the 'Aklına takılanlar' FAQ section on the homepage expands an answer when its question is clicked, and collapses again on a second click.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /#sss (the FAQ section of the homepage)
The heading 'Aklına takılanlar' is visible with a list of collapsed FAQ questions
Click the first FAQ question to expand it
The answer text below that question becomes visible (the FAQ item is now in its expanded/open state)
Click the same FAQ question again to collapse it
The answer text is hidden again (the FAQ item returns to its collapsed state)
